sections.paragraph:
to spice, to season oil for making ointments, Exo 30:33. The primary idea appears to be in making the spices small, which are mixed with the oil, comp. under רָקַק, and אַבְקַת רֹכֵל Son 3:6. Part. רֹקֵחַ an ointment maker, 30:35 Ecc 10:1.

Pual, pass., 2Ch 16:14.

Hiphil, to season (flesh), Eze 24:10.

Derivatives, רֶקַח-רִקֻּחִים, מֶרְקָח, מֶרְקָחָה, מִרְקַחַת.
